title: ChatMuteAndBan
body:
**Plugin Description:**

The Chat Moderation plugin enhances the chat functionality within Minecraft Java Edition servers by introducing intuitive buttons for muting and banning players directly from the chat interface. This plugin seamlessly integrates with LiteBans, a comprehensive ban management plugin, to empower server moderators with efficient tools for managing player interactions.

**Key Features:**

- **Streamlined Moderation:** Instantly mute or ban players with just a click, directly from the chat window.
  
- **LiteBans Integration:** Utilizes LiteBans plugin commands to execute moderation actions, ensuring compatibility and leveraging LiteBans' advanced features.

- **Non-intrusive Design:** Maintains the original Minecraft chat format, seamlessly integrating moderation features without disrupting the player experience.

- **User-Friendly Interface:** Intuitive buttons empower moderators to efficiently manage player behavior, fostering a positive and safe gaming environment.

Empower your server moderators and elevate your community management capabilities with the Chat Moderation plugin for Minecraft Java Edition!
